calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-03-2022 Vacated

Plaintiff Jesse Li'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Feb-04-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Plaintiff JESSE LI (Tel: 415-885-9772) in pro per;
Atty. WINSTON K. HU, Esq. of Hanson Bridgett LLP (Tel: 415-777-3200) for defendant Sutter Bay Hospitals dba California Pacific Medical Center.

Further Hearing Re: Plaintiff Jesse Li's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents.

The parties stipulated to the pro tem judge at a prior hearing.

The parties inform the Court that this matter has been resolved.

The Court takes the matter off calendar.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Plaintiff Jesse Li'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jan-07-2022 Continued To Feb-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jesse Li (415.885.9772; jesseli2@hotmail.com) Plaintiff in propria persona.
Winston Hu, Esq. (415.777.3200; whu@hansonbridgett.com) of Hanson Bridgett LLP for Defendant.

Parties' stipulation to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem from previous hearing.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Jesse Li's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents: is continued to February 4, 2022 at 9:00am, discovery department. Parties to report status on meet and confer efforts to Judge Pro Tem by Jan. 21, 2022 at klgallo@discoveryreferee.com. Parties were provided with contact information for reaching out to MSC dept.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs First Set Of Discovery Requests To Defendant Sutter; Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jesse Li (415.885.9772; jesseli2@hotmail.com) Plaintiff in propria persona.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JESSE LI's Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff's First Set Of Discovery Requests To Defendant Sutter; Motion For Sanctions:

Granted as to Form Interrogatories 12.2, 12.3, 12.4, 12.6, 12.7, 12.7, 13.1 and 13.2 as all objections are overruled. Defendant to serve verified responses in compliance with CCP section 2030.210 et seq. by January 6, 2022. The motion to compel further responses to requests for Production of documents is continued to January 7, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. Plaintiff to serve a new, corrected separate statement which tracks the correct request with the response and why there should be a further response on the court and opposing party no later than December 22, 2021. Defendant may respond to the corrected separate statement no later than December 29, 2021.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
